code:
import string

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errors: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = append(errors, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errors = append(errors, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errors = append(errors, "too-old")
  end
  errors
end

fn append(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  for item in xs
    result = push_str(result, item)
  end
  push_str(result, x)
end

fn push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  mut out: List<String> = []
  for item in xs
    out = single_append(out, item)
  end
  single_append(out, x)
end

fn single_append(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  [x]
end

fn report(_ errors: List<String>) -> Unit
  if errors.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    mut joined = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = errors.len()
    while i < n
      let e = match errors.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      if i == 0
        joined = "#{e}"
      else
        joined = "#{joined},#{e}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("errors=#{joined}")
  end
end

report(validate("", -5))
report(validate("Alice", 30))
report(validate("Bob", 200))
